zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Alice Ashton Hoghton於1482年出生在英國英格蘭恩布利亞霍頓時，她的父親Sir Thomas de Ashton42歲，母親Agnes Harrington10歲。她和Sir Thomas Hoghton至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1529年享年47歲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Alice Ashton Hoghton于1482年出生在英国英格兰恩布利亞霍頓时，她的父亲Sir Thomas de Ashton42岁，母亲Agnes Harrington10岁。她和Sir Thomas Hoghton至少有2个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1529年享年47岁，埋葬在英国藍卡爾。

nameMeanings.name: Hoghton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Houghton
meanings: habitational name from any of numerous places called Houghton or Hoghton. Most of the placenames derive from Old English hōh ‘heel, spur of land’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though some have different etymologies; for example, Little Houghton in Eccles (Lancashire), which derives from Old English halh ‘nook, corner of land’ + tūn, and Houghton in Bigbury (Devon), which may derive from an Old English personal name Huhha + Old English tūn.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

nameMeanings.name: Ashton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, a local name from any of the numerous places in England named with Old English æsc ‘ash tree’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’. This occurs occasionally as a boy's name in England from the 1600s; it is now used also for girls, partly, perhaps, due to the vogue for Ashley .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Alice Ashton Hoghton was born in 1482, in Houghton, Cumbria, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Thomas de Ashton, was 42 and her mother, Agnes Harrington, was 10. She had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Sir Thomas Hoghton. She died in 1529, at the age of 47, and was buried in Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Alice Ashton Hoghton est née en 1482, à Houghton, Cumbria, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Thomas de Ashton, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Agnes Harrington, avait 10 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Sir Thomas Hoghton. Elle est décédée en 1529, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterrée à Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Alice Ashton Hoghton 1482 in Houghton, Cumbria, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas de Ashton 42 und ihre Mutter Agnes Harrington 10. Sie hatte mit Sir Thomas Hoghton mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1529 im Alter von 47 Jahren und wurde in Lancashire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Alice Ashton Hoghton è nata il nel 1482 nel Houghton, Cumbria, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Thomas de Ashton, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Agnes Harrington, aveva 10 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Sir Thomas Hoghton. Morì nel 1529, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolta a Lancashire, England.

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Alice Ashton Hoghton(이)가 1482년 영국 잉글랜드 c브리아 허그h턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas de Ashton(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Harrington(은)는 10세였다. 그녀는 Sir Thomas Hoghton(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1529년 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르에 묻혔다.
